evals.description: Triggers on request to design an interview loop
evals.prompt: I'm hiring a senior backend engineer. Help me design the interview loop - what rounds should I include and what should each one test?
Create a scoring rubric for a coding interview round that I can use across all candidates consistently.

evals.description: Explains the principle that scores must be submitted independently before debrief
evals.prompt: What's the right way to run a hiring debrief to avoid groupthink?

evals.description: Can generate behavioral questions in STAR format for a given competency
evals.prompt: Write three behavioral interview questions to assess a candidate's ability to handle ambiguity, following STAR format.

evals.description: Can design a take-home coding challenge with evaluation criteria
evals.prompt: I want to replace our whiteboard coding round with a take-home assignment for a full-stack engineer role. How should I design it?

evals.description: Explains how to structure a system design interview
evals.prompt: Walk me through how to run a 45-minute system design interview. What structure should the interviewer follow?

evals.description: Can explain how to run calibration sessions
evals.prompt: Two of my interviewers gave the same candidate a 4 and a 1 for problem decomposition. How do I prevent this going forward?

evals.description: Identifies gut-feel interviews as an anti-pattern
evals.prompt: My co-founder wants to skip rubrics and just have engineers interview people they'd want to work with. Is that a good idea?
Should I use classic brainteaser questions like 'how many ping pong balls fit in a 747' to test problem-solving skills?

evals.description: Gives concrete advice on structuring culture fit assessment without bias
evals.prompt: How do I assess culture fit without using it as a proxy for bias?

evals.description: Does not trigger for candidate interview prep
evals.prompt: I have a Google system design interview next week. How should I prepare?

evals.description: Does not trigger for compensation or offer negotiation
evals.prompt: A candidate passed all interviews. What salary should we offer them?
